title: dryopteris eatonii
intro: Dryopteris eatonii, also known as Eaton's fern or autumn fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris eatonii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
